creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text: Erm, allow me to rephrase: forget the patch; fetch the current version of the special_media script from the link above and put it where it belongs.  After that you shouldn't need any special autofs configuration, apart from the steps described in the "17.4.2. Automounting Removable Media" section of https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/usb-disks.html.
